7 #ifndef SCALARBOUNDARYCONDITION_H
8 #define SCALARBOUNDARYCONDITION_H
9 
10 #include "IBoundaryCondition.h"
11 
12 #include "BoundaryConditionTypes.h"
13 
14 
15 using namespace Arcane;
16 
27 class ScalarBoundaryCondition : public IBoundaryCondition {
28  public:
29  struct Error {
30  std::string msg;
31  Error(const std::string& _msg) : msg(_msg) {}
32  };
33 
34  public:
36  ScalarBoundaryCondition(BoundaryConditionTypes::eType type,
37  IFunctionR4vR1* value) :
38  m_type(type), m_value(value)
39  {
40  m_value->init() ;
41  }
43  virtual ~ScalarBoundaryCondition() {}
44 
45  public:
47  Real eval(const Real3& x = Real3(0, 0, 0), Real t = 0) { return m_value->eval(x.x,x.y,x.z, t); }
49  inline BoundaryConditionTypes::eType getType() { return m_type; }
50 
51  private:
53  BoundaryConditionTypes::eType m_type;
55  IFunctionR4vR1* m_value;
56 };
57 
58 #endif
